data.title: Diesel soars all over the world in outsized Iran war impact
data.description: Prices for diesel have reacted strongly to the conflict in the West Asia, in part because the Strait of Hormuz is a key route for large volumes of the fuel produced at nearby refineries.

data.title: Dollar reclaims ultimate haven role as war, inflation angst grow
